reviews.review_title: Can’t use app without a referral link
reviews.review_description: Not able to use the app without logging in on a website first. There is no way to sign up for the website without a referral link. If apps are not usable without external accounts and referrals, they should be clear about that in the description. It is such a waste of time to keep downloading these apps only to find out I can’t use them.
